name: Arbitrum DeFi Strategist
description: AI agent for multi-protocol DeFi analysis and execution on Arbitrum. Deep integration with GMX V2 perpetuals, Aave V3 lending, and multi-DEX aggregation (Uniswap V3 + Camelot). Provides cross-protocol yield optimization, portfolio risk assessment, and actionable strategy recommendations.

gmx_v2.description: Perpetual futures: market data, OI analysis, funding rate signals, position monitoring

aave_v3.description: Lending/borrowing: health factor monitoring, APY tracking, liquidation risk assessment

camelot.description: Arbitrum-native DEX: swap quoting for price comparison
